pi_items.source: Found in setup_task.sh which creates the user
Found in setup_task.sh which creates the project
Redmine source code maps the target setting 'Issues created by or assigned to the user' to internal value 'own'
Redmine source code (lib/redmine/preparation.rb) lists 'add_issue_notes' instead of 'add_notes'. The claim has a typo inherited by the verifier script.
Redmine source code matches these exact strings for editing/deleting issues and wiki/repo access

privileged_info_summary: The correct target details for the 'External Reviewer' role are on project 'mobile-banking' for user 'jordan.lee'. The intended issues visibility is 'own'. Crucially, the internal permission string for 'Add notes' is 'add_issue_notes', despite the metadata claiming 'add_notes', rendering the evaluation logic technically flawed. Other permission values exactly match the Redmine codebase.
